# Two-Factor Authentication

Two-factor authentication (2FA) is a key feature provided by Acme Shop to strengthen account security. It requires an additional verification step during login after entering the password. To set up 2FA, users need a compatible mobile device and a linked phone number, followed by enabling it in the 'Account Security' section and selecting a verification method such as SMS or an authenticator app. Activation enhances account protection and is free, but losing access to the verification method may complicate account recovery, which can take up to 24 hours with customer support assistance. Travelers should verify that their chosen method functions internationally to avoid login problems.

[Source: account_security.md#two-factor-authentication]
